overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Corporate Bond ETF (GIGL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages a portfolio of investment grade corporate bonds of various maturities. The funds investments in non-USD obligations will not exceed 25% of its assets. GIGL was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
